description: JESD204B clock generator, 14 outputs, dual-loop PLL, integrated VCO
notes: 16-bit register addresses; 24-bit total SPI word (R/W + 15-bit addr + 8-bit data)
Two PLLs in series: PLL1 (jitter cleanup) -> PLL2 (frequency synthesis)
Drives both DEVCLK and SYSREF for AD9082/AD9208/AD9162 family
